import json, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
from datetime import date
from engine.models import Nurse, Request, Rules, DataManager

dm = DataManager\(\)
nurses = dm.load_nurses\(\)
rules = dm.load_rules\(\)
settings = dm.load_settings\(\)
start_date = date.fromisoformat\(settings.get\('start_date', '2026-03-29'\)\)
requests = dm.load_requests\(start_date\)

print\(f'간호사: {len\(nurses\)}명, 시작일: {start_date}'\)
print\(f'규칙: D={rules.daily_D}, E={rules.daily_E}, N={rules.daily_N}, M={rules.daily_M}'\)

from engine.solver import validate_requests
warnings = validate_requests\(nurses, requests, rules, start_date\)
if warnings:
    print\('\\\\n=== 검증 경고 ==='\)
    for w in warnings:
        print\(' -', w\)
else:
    print\('검증 경고 없음'\)

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\choiy\\Desktop\\nurse-scheduler" && uv run python -c "
import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
from datetime import date, timedelta
from engine.models import DataManager

dm = DataManager\(\)
nurses = dm.load_nurses\(\)
rules = dm.load_rules\(\)
settings = dm.load_settings\(\)
start_date = date.fromisoformat\(settings.get\('start_date', '2026-03-29'\)\)
requests = dm.load_requests\(start_date\)

# 중2 role 간호사 목록
jungdu_nurses = [n for n in nurses if n.role == '중2']
print\('=== 중2 간호사 ==='\)
for n in jungdu_nurses:
    print\(f'  {n.name}: fixed_off={n.fixed_weekly_off}, 4day={n.is_4day_week}'\)

# 평일별 중2 가능 인원 계산
print\(\)
print\('=== 평일별 중2 투입 가능 인원 ==='\)
wd_names = ['월','화','수','목','금','토','일']
num_days = 28
for di in range\(num_days\):
    d = start_date + timedelta\(days=di\)
    wd = d.weekday\(\)
    if wd >= 5:  # 주말 skip
        continue
    day = di + 1
    # 주 배정 되어있어 중2 불가 \(fixed_weekly_off == wd\)
    forced_off = [n.name for n in jungdu_nurses if n.fixed_weekly_off == wd]
    # 하드 off 요청
    hard_off_req = []
    for r in requests:
        nurse = next\(\(n for n in jungdu_nurses if n.id == r.nurse_id\), None\)
        if nurse and r.day == day and r.is_hard and r.code not in \('D','E','N','중2'\):
            hard_off_req.append\(nurse.name\)
    available = [n.name for n in jungdu_nurses if n.name not in forced_off and n.name not in hard_off_req]
    status = '⚠ 0명!' if len\(available\) == 0 else \('주의' if len\(available\) <= 1 else ''\)
    print\(f'  Day{day:2d}\({wd_names[wd]}\): 주휴={forced_off}, 하드off={hard_off_req}, 가능={available} {status}'\)
" 2>&1 | python -c "import sys; sys.stdout.buffer.write\(sys.stdin.buffer.read\(\)\)")

import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
from datetime import date
from engine.models import DataManager, Rules
from engine.solver import solve_schedule
import copy, dataclasses

dm = DataManager\(\)
nurses = dm.load_nurses\(\)
rules = dm.load_rules\(\)
settings = dm.load_settings\(\)
start_date = date.fromisoformat\(settings.get\('start_date', '2026-03-29'\)\)
requests = dm.load_requests\(start_date\)

def try_rules\(**overrides\):
    r = dataclasses.replace\(rules, **overrides\)
    result = solve_schedule\(nurses, requests, r, start_date\)
    return result is not None and bool\(result.schedule_data\)

# 1. 현재 설정 \(이미 INFEASIBLE 확인됨\)
print\('M=1, N제한=6:', '가능' if try_rules\(\) else '불가'\)
# 2. daily_M=0 \(중2 제거\)
print\('M=0 \(중2 제거\):', '가능' if try_rules\(daily_M=0\) else '불가'\)
" 2>&1 | python -c "import sys; sys.stdout.buffer.write\(sys.stdin.buffer.read\(\)\)")

import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
from datetime import date
from engine.models import DataManager, Rules
from engine.solver import solve_schedule
import dataclasses

dm = DataManager\(\)
nurses = dm.load_nurses\(\)
rules = dm.load_rules\(\)
settings = dm.load_settings\(\)
start_date = date.fromisoformat\(settings.get\('start_date', '2026-03-29'\)\)
requests = dm.load_requests\(start_date\)

def try_rules\(**overrides\):
    r = dataclasses.replace\(rules, **overrides\)
    result = solve_schedule\(nurses, requests, r, start_date\)
    ok = result is not None and bool\(result.schedule_data\)
    return ok

# N 제한 완화
print\('N제한=7:', '가능' if try_rules\(daily_M=0, max_N_per_month=7\) else '불가'\)
print\('N제한=8:', '가능' if try_rules\(daily_M=0, max_N_per_month=8\) else '불가'\)
print\('N제한=9:', '가능' if try_rules\(daily_M=0, max_N_per_month=9\) else '불가'\)
print\('N제한=10:', '가능' if try_rules\(daily_M=0, max_N_per_month=10\) else '불가'\)

import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
from datetime import date
from engine.models import DataManager
from engine.solver import solve_schedule
import dataclasses

dm = DataManager\(\)
nurses = dm.load_nurses\(\)
rules = dm.load_rules\(\)
settings = dm.load_settings\(\)
start_date = date.fromisoformat\(settings.get\('start_date', '2026-03-29'\)\)
requests = dm.load_requests\(start_date\)

def try_rules\(**overrides\):
    r = dataclasses.replace\(rules, **overrides\)
    result = solve_schedule\(nurses, requests, r, start_date\)
    return result is not None and bool\(result.schedule_data\)

# 직급 제약 완화
print\('직급없이 \(min_chief=0, min_senior=0\):', 
      '가능' if try_rules\(daily_M=0, max_N_per_month=10, min_chief_per_shift=0, min_senior_per_shift=0\) else '불가'\)
# 역순 금지 해제
print\('역순금지 해제:', 
      '가능' if try_rules\(daily_M=0, max_N_per_month=10, min_chief_per_shift=0, min_senior_per_shift=0, ban_reverse_order=False\) else '불가'\)
# 연속근무 완화 \(5→7\)
print\('연속근무 7일:', 
      '가능' if try_rules\(daily_M=0, max_N_per_month=10, min_chief_per_shift=0, min_senior_per_shift=0, ban_reverse_order=False, max_consecutive_work=7\) else '불가'\)
" 2>&1 | python -c "import sys; sys.stdout.buffer.write\(sys.stdin.buffer.read\(\)\)")

Bash(cd "C:\\Users\\choiy\\Desktop\\nurse-scheduler" && uv run python -c "
import sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\)
from datetime import date
from engine.models import DataManager

dm = DataManager\(\)
nurses = dm.load_nurses\(\)
settings = dm.load_settings\(\)
start_date = date.fromisoformat\(settings.get\('start_date', '2026-03-29'\)\)
requests = dm.load_requests\(start_date\)

nurse_map = {n.id: n for n in nurses}
# 주별로 OFF 하드 요청 충돌 찾기
print\('=== 같은 주에 OFF 요청 2개 이상인 간호사 ==='\)
for nid in set\(r.nurse_id for r in requests\):
    nurse = nurse_map.get\(nid\)
    if not nurse: continue
    hard_offs_by_week = {}
    for r in requests:
        if r.nurse_id != nid: continue
        if not r.is_hard: continue
        if r.code != 'OFF': continue  # H11은 정확히 _OFF 타입만
        week = \(r.day - 1\) // 7  # 0,1,2,3
        hard_offs_by_week.setdefault\(week, []\).append\(r.day\)
    for w, days in hard_offs_by_week.items\(\):
        if len\(days\) >= 2:
            print\(f'  {nurse.name}: {w+1}주차 OFF {days} → H11 위반! \(주당 OFF=1 강제\)'\)
" 2>&1 | python -c "import sys; sys.stdout.buffer.write\(sys.stdin.buffer.read\(\)\)")
